name: Sync Valhalla Sigma rules into Sekoia Rules Catalog
description: Periodically pulls the Valhalla Sigma feed and POSTs each rule to the Sekoia Rules Catalog so it executes in the detection engine. POST on first seen, PUT on subsequent pulls.

alert_type_uuid.title: Alert type UUID
alert_type_uuid.description: Sekoia alert taxonomy UUID. Fetch from GET /v1/sic/conf/alerts/types.

enabled.title: Enable rules on push
enabled.description: When false (default), rules land in the catalog disabled — users opt in per rule.

min_sigma_level.title: Minimum Sigma level
min_sigma_level.description: Only rules with a Sigma `level` at least this severe are imported. Rules missing the `level` field are always skipped.

min_sigma_status.title: Minimum Sigma status
min_sigma_status.description: Only rules with a Sigma `status` at least this mature are imported (ordering: unsupported < deprecated < experimental < test < stable). Rules missing the `status` field are always skipped.
